paper.title: Nearby high-speed stars in Gaia DR2

review.summary: Quick scan: investigates ~1.5M Gaia DR2 stars with 5-sigma parallax, PM, and RV. Identifies ~100 high-speed stars; only 2 have ~100% unbound probability. These are hyper-runaway star candidates. Also identifies 19 unbound candidates from PM-only (5-D) analysis. Table hvsvt lists 19 PM-only candidates.
